scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:admin
scripts.verify:web: npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm --prefix apps/web test
scripts.verify:admin: npm --prefix apps/admin run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/admin run lint && npm --prefix apps/admin run build
scripts.verify: npm run verify:web && npm run verify:admin
